title: Combinational Circuits II: Decoder
description: Learn how to build a 2-to-4 Decoder.

steps.instruction: Add two Input Switch elements to the canvas
steps.hint: Click the I/O tab in the left panel, then drag two Input Switch elements onto the canvas.

steps.instruction: Add two NOT gates to the canvas and connect each Input Switch into a separate NOT gate
steps.hint: Click the gates tab in the left panel, then drag two NOT gate elements onto the canvas and connect the Input Switches into them.

steps.instruction: Add four AND gates and four LEDs to the canvas, then connect each AND gate to one of the LEDs
steps.hint: Use the gates tab in the left panel to add the AND gates and the I/O tab to add the LEDs.

steps.instruction: Connect the outputs of the NOT gates and the Input Switches to the AND gates so each AND gate represents one input combination
steps.hint: Each AND gate should receive one signal from each input. Use the original Input Switch signal for a 1 and the corresponding NOT gate output for a 0..

steps.instruction: For every specific combination of input bits, only one corresponding output line is activated while all others remain inactive
